title: Golden Heads
description: This plugin adds golden heads that are perfect for UHC based pvp
body:
# 🟡 Description – GoldenHeads
GoldenHeads is a Minecraft plugin that introduces a custom golden player head item inspired by UHC-style healing. Players can use the /goldenhead command to receive a uniquely skinned head (based on the player uoap) that grants powerful temporary buffs when used.

When a Golden Head is:

- 🖱 Right-clicked in the air

- 🧱 Placed on the ground

…it disappears and instantly gives:

- 🩸 Regeneration III (5 seconds)

- 🛡 Absorption II (2 minutes)

- 🌀 Speed II (14 seconds)

- 💨 Burp sound effect upon use

**Cooldowns are configurable in config.yml, preventing spamming and encouraging strategic use.**
